most_triggering_sentence: Beacon+ will monitor how you use core features so we can personalize recommendations and share engagement insights with partners

ranked_sentence_scores.sentence: Beacon+ will monitor how you use core features so we can personalize recommendations and share engagement insights with partners
Today we are launching Beacon+, an always-on assistant that helps customers unlock more value from their devices
The new feature makes collaboration faster and gives every team better analytics for monetization and product planning
